sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: O come, let us worship God and bow low before the God who made us, for he is the Lord our God

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm 2025
sections.snippet: In the sight of the angels I will sing your praises, Lord. I will sing, I will sing.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm 2025
sections.snippet: Come after me and I will make you fishers of men.

sections.title: Come to Jesus
sections.author: Josh Blakesley
sections.snippet: People of the God of ages, welcome to your brand new day. Leave the world and all it's trappings, come into Amazing Grace. Let go your every fear. There is only mercy here

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Let them thank the Lord for his mercy, his wonders for the children of men, for he satisfies the thirsty soul, and the hungry he fills with good things.

sections.title: Be Not Afraid/No Temas Más
sections.author: Bob Dufford SJ
sections.snippet: You shall cross the barren desert, but you shall not die of thirst. You shall wander far in safety, though you do not know the way. You shall speak your words in foreign lands  and all will understand. You shall see the face of God and live.

sections.title: I Sought the Lord
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: I sought the Lord and he answered me and delivered me from my fears. Look to him that you may be radiant, and you may not blush with shame.

sections.title: Go Out, Go Out
sections.author: Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Go out, go out to all the world and tell the Good News. Tell the Good... Good News!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
